meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no design skills (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no design skills. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: User Onboarding Without Design Skills
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with UI. Learn to build high-converting user onboarding flows using Antigravity and Claude Code to impress clients and ship faster.
content.answer_block: You don't need a design degree to build high-converting onboarding. By leveraging modular component libraries in Antigravity and orchestrating logic with Claude Code, you can automate professional-grade UI generation. Focus on user success metrics rather than pixels, and let AI handle the aesthetic heavy lifting for your client projects.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, the client’s deadline is looming, and your design skills are, to put it mildly, non-existent. You have the backend logic down, but the onboarding flow—the literal gateway to your product’s value—looks like a relic from 2005. The pressure to ship a polished, premium experience is suffocating.

But here is the secret: top-tier builders don't design from scratch; they orchestrate systems. By combining the rapid interface prototyping of Antigravity with the surgical precision of Claude Code, you can transform a functional wireframe into a sleek, conversion-optimized onboarding experience in hours, not weeks.

steps.title: Define the User Success Path
steps.description: Before writing code, map out the minimum steps a user needs to reach their 'Aha!' moment. Keep it under three interactions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a 3-step onboarding flow structure for a SaaS tool. Focus on minimalist utility, using a clean layout, clear progress indicators, and high-contrast CTA buttons.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a JSON schema for a 3-step onboarding state machine including fields for user preferences and initial setup data.'

steps.title: Bootstrap the UI Components
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the visual components that maintain design consistency without manual CSS tweaking.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive React component for an onboarding card that includes an icon, a concise headline, a sub-headline, and a primary button. Use a modern, professional color palette.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Implement the new onboarding card component into the /components/onboarding directory and ensure it maps to the state machine.'

steps.title: Orchestrate State Management
steps.description: Connect your onboarding steps so the user flow is seamless and data persists across refreshes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a React hook to manage the onboarding step index and local storage persistence for user progress.
steps.claude_code_command: claude refactor 'Integrate the useOnboarding hook into the main App component and add a redirect to the dashboard upon completion.'

steps.title: Implement Intelligent Validation
steps.description: Ensure users provide valid data during onboarding to prevent downstream errors in your application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a form validation schema using Zod for an onboarding step that collects user name, industry, and company size.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Add Zod validation to the onboarding submission handler and display error messages in a toast notification.'

steps.title: Polishing & Micro-Interactions
steps.description: Add subtle animations to make the interface feel premium and responsive.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Suggest Framer Motion transitions for the onboarding card to slide in from the right and fade out on completion.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply 'Apply Framer Motion animations to the onboarding flow for a smooth transition between steps.'

pro_tips: Always prioritize 'skip' buttons; forcing users through onboarding increases churn significantly.
Use telemetry to track where users drop off in your onboarding flow and iterate based on that data.
Hardcode the copy once, but keep the UI components dynamic to allow for A/B testing different messaging.
Leverage Claude Code to write unit tests for your onboarding state machine to ensure it never breaks on edge cases.
Keep your onboarding assets in a separate folder structure to allow for easy reuse across different client projects.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, implement a post-onboarding email sequence and begin tracking your activation rate to validate your design choices.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting design gaps hold your freelance career hostage. Start building professional, high-converting interfaces today with the power of AI. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
